attributes.name: view-model
attributes.description: Specifies the ViewModel class to bind to this template

attributes.name: view-model
attributes.description: Specifies the ViewModel class to bind to this component

tags.name: outlet
tags.description: Placeholder for child route content in a layout template

attributes.name: prop-{name}
attributes.description: One-way binding from layout ViewModel to page ViewModel

attributes.name: const-{name}
attributes.description: Constant value passed to the page ViewModel

attributes.name: link-{name}
attributes.description: Two-way binding between layout ViewModel and page ViewModel

globalAttributes.name: view-model
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Associates a ViewModel with this element

globalAttributes.name: bind-value
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds the value property to a ViewModel property (for input, textarea, select)

globalAttributes.name: bind-content
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds the innerHTML content to a ViewModel property (for display elements)

globalAttributes.name: bind-src
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds the src attribute to a ViewModel property (for img elements)

globalAttributes.name: bind-alt
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds the alt attribute to a ViewModel property (for img elements, a11y/WCAG)

globalAttributes.name: bind-enabled
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds the enabled state to a boolean ViewModel property (for input, select, button, textarea, optgroup, option, fieldset)

globalAttributes.name: if
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Conditional rendering based on a ViewModel property

globalAttributes.name: bind-class
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds CSS classes to a ViewModel property

globalAttributes.name: bind-style
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds inline styles to a ViewModel property

globalAttributes.name: click
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds click event to a ViewModel method

globalAttributes.name: enter
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Binds Enter keypress event to a ViewModel method on input elements

globalAttributes.name: for-each
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Iterates over a collection from the ViewModel (syntax: item of collection)

globalAttributes.name: index
globalAttributes.description: Pelela: Specifies the index variable name for for-each loops
